## What does this PR do?



## Checklist

- [ ] No real gateway host or key — uses `your-gateway.example.com` and
      `BIFROST_BASE_URL` / `BIFROST_API_KEY`.
- [ ] Examples are runnable and read secrets from the environment.
- [ ] Model strings use the `provider/model` form.
- [ ] If I changed the skill, I updated **both** language variants
      (`bifrost-gateway` and `bifrost-gateway-ru`).
- [ ] New examples are linked from `README.md` and `README.ru.md`.
